title: asplenium majus
intro: Asplenium majus, also known as the Large Spleenwort or Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Asplenium majus include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Asplenium majus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to have therapeutic effects when consumed.
